case_title: THE GRANADA, INC., DBA THE GRANADA vs. ZVETKOV, GEORGE et al

docket_entries.description: 9:00AM DEPT 8, JUDGE ROBERT A. BARCLAY. C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT, PLTF PRESENT THROUGH COUNSEL, R. MICHAEL LIEBERMAN, DEFT PRESENT IN PRO PER. OPENING STATEMENTS BOTH SIDES. PLTF'S CASE, ORAL & DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE GIVEN. PLTF RESTS. DEFENSE PRESENTS CASE THROUGH ORAL EVIDENCE. DEFENSE RESTS. PLTF'S MOTION TO STRIKE TESTIMONY REGARDING TESTIMONY - GRANTED. DEFENSE RESTS.
